ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "mil_thickness" TEXT /* Thickness of the product in mil */,
  "qty_per_case" INTEGER /* Quantity of items per case */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product in width x length format */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product in pounds */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material used in the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the product was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the product details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for nested categories) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the category was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the category details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, customer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user for shipping purposes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "carts" (
  "cart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cart */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the cart */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the cart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the cart was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cart_items" (
  "cart_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cart item */,
  "cart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cart containing this item */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the cart */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the cart */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time it was added to the cart */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount applied to the product in the cart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cart_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_items_cart_id FOREIGN KEY ("cart_id") REFERENCES carts ("cart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wish_lists" (
  "wish_list_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wish list */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the wish list */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the wish list was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the wish list was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wish_list_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wish_lists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wish_list_items" (
  "wish_list_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wish list item */,
  "wish_list_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wish list containing the item */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the wish list */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time it was added to the wish list */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount applied to the product in the wish list */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wish_list_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wish_list_items_wish_list_id FOREIGN KEY ("wish_list_id") REFERENCES wish_lists ("wish_list_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wish_list_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the order status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order containing this item */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time it was ordered */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount applied to the product in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in inventory */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Threshold level for reordering the product */,
  "last_restocked_at" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last restocked */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product to which the discount applies */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the discount */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the discount period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the discount period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the discount was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the discount details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discounts_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was shipped */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., standard, express) */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the shipping record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the shipping record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the role details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the supplier was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the supplier details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for whom the recommendation is made */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended product */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation (e.g., based on previous purchases, wish list items) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
